title: Why IDEXX Stock Popped Today
text: The animal healthcare company beat estimates on the top and bottom lines.

title: Idexx Laboratories (IDXX) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Idexx (IDXX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.39% and 1.50%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
